title: DOMSHOCT L Shaped Gaming Desk with Power Outlets, 100x70cm Small Corner Computer Table with Large Reversible Storage Shelves, Home Office PC Workstation with Hooks for Writing Study, Black
features: Convenient Charging Options: The Domshoct L Shaped Gaming Desk features 2 power outlets, including 1 USB and 1 Type-C charging port, with a cord length of 1.5 meters. Easily charge your gaming devices, laptop, or smartphone while keeping your workspace clutter-free.

Flexible Storage Solutions: With reversible storage shelves, you can customize your setup to suit your needs. The double-layer shelves can be positioned on either side, allowing for flexible organization of books, files, or gaming accessories in your home office or study area.

Ample Space for Your Equipment: The Domshoct desk's spacious design includes two-layer shelves with removable dividers, perfect for storing your computer host. It also features a convenient headphone hook, helping you keep your workspace neat.

Sturdy and Stable Structure: Built with a robust steel frame and adjustable foot pads, this corner desk provides exceptional stability. The design ensures a solid foundation, making it perfect for both gaming and working without wobbling.
Easy to Assemble: Domshoct corner desk is simple to maneuver and assemble. It includes a detailed installation manual to help you spend less time putting it together.
description: Product Description High-Quality Desktop Anti-scratch & Waterproof & Easy Clean Left/Right Reversible Shelves Install Shelves on the left or right to your needs Adjustable foot pads Keep desk steady even on uneven floor Earphone hook Can be used to hang a backpack or headphones Corner Office Desk L Shaped Gaming Desk Computer Gaming Desk Office Drawers Desk Folding Function Desk Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 156 4.7 out of 5 stars 45 4.2 out of 5 stars 35 4.2 out of 5 stars 20 4.6 out of 5 stars 34 Price £47.99 £ 47 . 99 £66.49 £ 66 . 49 £74.99 £ 74 . 99 £66.49 £ 66 . 49 £47.49 £ 47 . 49 Built-In Outlet 1 Power Outlet 1 Power Outlet 1 Power Outlet 1 Power Outlet ✘ Audio Reactive LED Strip ✘ 1 light strip(80cm) 2 light strip(50cm) ✘ ✘ Storage Bag ✘ 1 Storage Bag 1 Storage Bag ✘ 1 Storage Bag Drawers ✘ ✘ ✘ 2 Drawers ✘ Removable Monitor Stand ✘ 1 Stand (80*20cm) 2 Stands (50*20cm) 1 Stands (50*20cm) 1 Stand (60*11cm) Headphone hook 1 Headphone hook ✘ ✘ 1 Headphone hook ✘ Left/Right Reversible Shelves ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✘ Shape L-Shape L-Shape Rectangular Rectangular Rectangular
